title: CPU又100%了
quality_notes: Filtered extract is concise and directly runbook-shaped for MySQL CPU diagnosis.
known_limitations: Kill command in source can be ambiguous unless processlist_id is clarified.
recommended_use: Use as primary source for MySQL CPU OS-thread-to-SQL procedure.

title: PolarDB MySQL跨可用区强一致解决方案
quality_notes: Short, coherent article explaining architecture and core kernel mechanisms.
known_limitations: No LLM-filtered version found in chunks.
Does not provide exact product setup checklist.
recommended_use: Use for PolarDB mechanism and trade-off discussion; avoid inventing setup parameters.

title: 高并发下连接池：性能飞升的魔法秘籍
quality_notes: Useful general connection pool concepts and HikariCP parameter discussion, but not a dedicated leak diagnosis source.
known_limitations: Does not include HikariCP leakDetectionThreshold or stack trace diagnosis.
Some prose is generic and metaphor-heavy.
recommended_use: Use as partial support for pool sizing, lifecycle, and generic leak/exhaustion concepts.

title: 运维做好述职-“让价值被看见”
quality_notes: Directly useful for career communication, conclusion-first structure, business language, and story framing.
known_limitations: STAR is not explicitly developed as a named framework.
recommended_use: Use for career/interview expression templates and resume bullet transformation.

title: 业务数据治理体系化思考与实践 - 美团技术团队
quality_notes: Good source for MECE, governance taxonomy, top-down framework design, and standardization.
known_limitations: Focused on data governance rather than personal interview method.
recommended_use: Use for MECE and systematic decomposition concepts.
